column1: # Vendor datasets to fetch onto the CI runner for the `vendor-corpus` job.
# Columns: dest_relpath <TAB> public_url [<TAB> unzip]
#   dest_relpath  path under vendor-in/ on the runner.
#   public_url    a PUBLIC http(s) URL (no credentials). PRIDE FTP paths are mirrored at
#                 https://ftp.pride.ebi.ac.uk/... — use that, not ftp://.
#   unzip         optional 3rd column literally "unzip": after download, extract the archive
#                 in place (into dest's directory) and delete the .zip. Used for Agilent .d.zip
#                 and Waters .raw.zip, which deposit a vendor DIRECTORY inside a single zip.
# convert_vendor_ci.sh then discovers *.wiff / Agilent .d / Waters .raw under vendor-in/ and
# converts+measures+DELETES one dataset at a time (disk-safe for multi-GB inputs).
# Coverage: SCIEX (.wiff/.wiff2, QTOF SWATH + ZenoTOF), Agilent QTOF (.d profile grid),
# Waters Synapt (.raw TWIMS ion-mobility). Smallest public file per dataset is chosen.
# --- SCIEX ZenoTOF 7600 (RNAseB MRM) — .wiff + .wiff.scan + .wiff2 — object store ------------
sciex-zenotof-7600/20240826_RNAseB_Reduced_50ngul_1ul_MRM_03.wiff
sciex-zenotof-7600/20240826_RNAseB_Reduced_50ngul_1ul_MRM_03.wiff.scan
sciex-zenotof-7600/20240826_RNAseB_Reduced_50ngul_1ul_MRM_03.wiff2
# --- SCIEX TripleTOF 6600 SWATH/DIA (grid-TOF candidate) — PXD078909, smallest .wiff pair ----
#     SW_F2_2-2.wiff (15 MB) + .wiff.scan (347 MB); zebrafish SWATH-MS.
sciex-tripletof-swath/SW_F2_2-2.wiff
sciex-tripletof-swath/SW_F2_2-2.wiff.scan
# --- Agilent QTOF .d (profile MSProfile.bin grid) — PXD041903, smallest .d.zip (442 MB) ------
#     20190423_Alex7.d.zip extracts to 20190423_Alex7.d/ (AcqData/MSProfile.bin etc.).
agilent-qtof/20190423_Alex7.d.zip
# --- Waters Synapt (TWIMS ion-mobility) .raw — PXD073666, smallest per-run .raw.zip (290 MB) -
#     20250628_cpB_100000ms_03.raw.zip extracts to ...raw/ (a Waters _FUNC*.DAT directory).
waters-synapt/20250628_cpB_100000ms_03.raw.zip
